text:
Everyone at Anthropic's developer conference brought a MacBook, one person brought Claude in their pocket.

Anthropic built a $10B AI company, this person built a pocket version of it over a weekend.

A Cardputer ADV, tiny keyboard, credit card size, Claude Buddy running live on https://t.co/3eCanunyNe https://t.co/ilCvCc2tYm
